title: Tipos de Documento de Identidad - MINSA Schema
description: JSON Schema for Tipos de Documento de Identidad - MINSA ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions using IRI format.
narrative: This schema validates IRI-formatted codes for the Tipos de Documento de Identidad - MINSA ValueSet. Each enum value includes the system URI in the format {systemuri}#{code} to match JSON-LD enumeration IRIs. Display values are available at http://minsa.gob.pe/immunizations/ValueSet-MINSAIdentifierTypeVS.displays.json. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
